sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66645" key="metadio/rqwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταδιόρθ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n66645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">correcting oneself</tr_>, as a figure of speech, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Donat.</author> </bibl> ad Ter.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ad.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">392</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Phorm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">232</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
